title: Where I'm Planted

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Like a tree by living waters
Drinking deep from wisdom's streams
Stands the one whose heart seeks higher
Than the world of fleeting dreams
Their leaves stay green through scorching summer
Bearing fruit in season's time
While autumn winds shake empty branches
This tree continues to climb

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Blessed is the soul that walks in truth
Far from shadows where deceivers dwell
Planted by the river, growing strong and tall
Drawing life from heaven's well

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Not so those who chase the darkness
Like chaff scattered in the wind
No roots to hold when storms are raging
No shelter there to tend
But those who meditate on goodness
Day and night in heaven's law
Find strength beyond their understanding
And peace forevermore

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Two paths diverge before us
One leads to life divine
Choose wisely where you journey
Let truth your heart define

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Blessed is the soul that walks in truth
Far from shadows where deceivers dwell
Planted by the river, growing strong and tall
Drawing life from heaven's well

sections.label: Outro
lines: For the Lord watches over righteous paths
While dark roads fade away
Like a tree by living waters
We choose to grow each day

epigraph: And he shall be like a tree planted by the rivers of water
